decisions.decision: Fixed models.py String(36) FK columns to use Uuid() type
decisions.rationale: PostgreSQL columns are uuid type after migration 74fa6d3 but ORM still sent varchar bindings — caused DatatypeMismatchError on any INSERT touching nullable FK fields (Fund, Company, Contact, Deal, DealTeamMember)

decisions.decision: Seed data omits ref_data FK fields (transaction_type_id, source_type_id, fundraise_status_id)
decisions.rationale: These fields are optional; seeding them requires UUID values from ref_data which varies per environment. Core deal data (EBITDA, revenue, dates, company/contact links) is sufficient for demo.

uncommitted_files: backend/models.py — String(36) FK columns changed to Uuid() for 14 fields across Fund, Company, Contact, Deal, DealTeamMember, ContactCoveragePerson
backend/seed_data.py — added Fund, 4 companies, 6 contacts, 6 deals with PE fields
next_action: Resume /gsd:execute-phase 4 — the orchestrator will present the pending checkpoint for plan 04-04 Task 2 (visual verification). Run make dev, verify UI, type 'approved' to proceed to phase verification.
